Feature Description: Create reusable making charge templates that can be applied to multiple products
Inputs: Group name, charge type (per_gram/flat/percent), charge value
Outputs: Making group entity with unique name per shop
Notes / Constraints: Groups enforce exclusive membership - one product can only belong to one group

Feature Description: Assign products to making groups via dedicated management modal with search and collection filtering
Notes / Constraints: Products already in other groups are disabled and show warning badge

Feature Description: Filter products by Shopify collection when assigning to making groups
Notes / Constraints: Uses cached collection data from Shopify GraphQL API

Feature Description: Pricing engine resolves making charges with priority: Product-level override > Making Group > Global settings
Inputs: Product data, making group data, global settings
Notes / Constraints: Maintains backward compatibility with existing products

Feature Description: Filter products list by Shopify collection
Notes / Constraints: Available on both Products page and Making Groups assignment modal

Feature Description: Automatically calculate gross gold weight from net weight and wastage percentage
Notes / Constraints: When enabled replaces manual gross gold weight input

Feature Description: Support both per-carat and per-piece pricing for custom gemstones
Inputs: Pricing method toggle, price value, weight/pieces
Notes / Constraints: Resolves 'Rate not set' errors for custom gems

Feature Description: Display and calculate CZ gemstones in grams instead of carats
Notes / Constraints: Backend stores in carats with 5:1 conversion ratio

Feature Description: Real-time sync progress indicator in top bar with detailed metrics tooltip
Track all sync operations as Job entities with metrics and status
Notes / Constraints: Enables observability and status polling via /api/sync/status

Feature Description: Skip database writes when Shopify product data hasn't changed
Outputs: Reduced DB writes and faster sync

Feature Description: Extended CSV template with custom gemstone fields for import/export
Proper blob-based file downloads with Content-Disposition header parsing
Notes / Constraints: Fixes port mismatch and missing file extensions

Feature Description: Fetch and cache all Shopify collections via GraphQL
Outputs: Array of collection objects with id and title
Notes / Constraints: 5-minute cache with pagination support for 250+ collections

Feature Description: Retrieve all product IDs belonging to a specific collection
